DesiredReplicas.description: Configure the desired number of nodes in the node pool.

Enabled.description: Configure the switch for node pool auto scaling. Parameter values: false: disabled true: enabled

MaxReplicas.description: Configure the maximum number of nodes in the node pool

MinReplicas.description: Configure the minimum number of nodes in the node pool

SubnetPolicy.description: Multi-subnet scheduling policy for the node pool. Parameter value description: ZoneBalance: availability zone balancing policy. Priority: subnet priority policy.

Type.description: Status conditions under the current primary state of the node pool, indicating the reasons for entering this state. There can be multiple reasons. Parameter values: ProgressingOk, ResourceCleanupFailed, Unknown, ClusterNotRunning.

MountPoint.description: Target mount directory after disk formatting.

SnapshotId.description: Create a data disk using a snapshot. You can call the DescribeSnapshots API to query the snapshot ID. Note: Only ultra-fast SSD and efficient cloud disks support creating disks from snapshots. Only snapshots in 'available' status can be used to create new disks; snapshots in 'creating', 'rolling back', 'deleting', or 'error' status cannot be used to create new disks

Type.description: Disk type: ESSD_PL0: ultra-fast SSD cloud disk with performance level PL0. ESSD_FlexPL: ultra-fast SSD cloud disk with performance level PL1.

InPlacePodVerticalScaling.description: Whether to enable the feature switch for local vertical Pod autoscaling

QoSResourceManager.description: Enable QoSResourceManager feature switch. Options: - true to enable - false to disable

CapacityRebalance.description: Capacity rebalancing. Value range: - true: enables this feature. When a preemptible instance is about to be reclaimed, a new preemptible instance is proactively created for compensation. - false (default): disables this feature. Waits until the preemptible instance is reclaimed before scaling out to make up the instance count.

CompensateWithOnDemand.description: Pay-as-you-go instance fallback feature. Value range: - true: enables this feature. If all preemptible instances fail to purchase due to insufficient inventory, pay-as-you-go instances will be attempted - false (default): disables this feature. When scaling preemptible instances, only the configured preemptible instances are attempted

OnDemandBaseCapacity.description: Base capacity size. The base capacity is always pay-as-you-go instances. Value range: [0,500], default: 0

OnDemandPercentageAboveBaseCapacity.description: Proportion of pay-as-you-go instances for capacity exceeding the base capacity. Value range [0, 100]. 0 means only preemptible instances are produced for excess capacity; 100 means only pay-as-you-go instances are produced. Default is 0.

Name.description: Resource name. Values: cpu or memory

Quantity.description: Specify the resource quantity. - For cpu, example value: 200m - For memory, example value: 1G

CpuManagerPolicy.description: Configure kubelet's CpuManagerPolicy. Includes none and static strategies

KubeApiBurst.description: Maximum number of burst requests sent to the API server per second. Does not include events and node heartbeat APIs, whose rate limits are controlled by a different set of flags.

KubeApiQps.description: Queries per second (QPS) for communication with apiserver. Does not include event and node heartbeat APIs; their rate limits are controlled by a different set of flags

KubeReserved.description: Resources reserved for Kubernetes system components on the node. By default, half of the default value in the node reserved resource policy is reserved

MaxPods.description: Configure the maximum number of Pods supported by kubelet

RegistryBurst.description: Set the maximum number of burst image pulls. Temporarily allow the number of image pulls specified by this parameter, provided it does not exceed the RegistryPullQps setting

RegistryPullQps.description: Can be used to limit the QPS cap for the image repository

SystemReserved.description: Resources reserved for the operating system on the node. By default, resources are reserved at half the default value specified in the node reserved resource policy.

TopologyManagerPolicy.description: Topology management policy. Values: none: (default) topology management policy disabled. restricted: kubelet only accepts Pods that achieve optimal NUMA (Non-Uniform Memory Access) on requested resources. best-effort: kubelet prioritizes Pods that achieve NUMA on CPU and device resources. single-numa-node: kubelet only allows Pods that achieve NUMA on CPU and device resources within the same node.

TopologyManagerScope.description: Resource granularity for topology management strategy. Values: container: resource alignment at container level. pod: resource alignment at Pod level

AutoSyncDisabled.description: Whether to disable the automatic synchronization of label taints to existing nodes. Parameter value description: true: disabled, automatic synchronization is turned off. false: not disabled, automatic synchronization is turned on.

Cordon.description: Node blocking configuration. Parameter value description: false: not blocked. true: blocked

Labels.description: Kubernetes label information for node pool/node

NamePrefix.description: Prefix of the metadata name for node objects in Kubernetes.

NameSuffix.description: Suffix of the metadata name for node objects in Kubernetes.

NameUseHostname.description: Whether the metadata name of the node object in Kubernetes uses the ECS host name. Values: true: use ECS host name as node name. false: do not use ECS host name as node name

Taints.description: Kubernetes taint information for the node pool/node

Password.description: Root user login password in Base64 encoding. Follow the cloud server password requirements: 8–30 characters, cannot start with / or $6$, must include at least three of the following: lowercase letters a–z, uppercase letters A–Z, numbers 0–9, special characters ( ) ` ~ ! @ # $ % ^ & * _ - + = | { } [ ] : ; ' < > , . ? /

SshKeyPairName.description: SSH key pair name. Please ensure the key pair is already created or hosted in the cloud server

Type.description: Node access login method. Parameter value description: Password: password login. SshKeyPair: SSH key pair login.

Enabled.description: Whether managed mode is enabled for the node pool. Values: - true: enabled - false: disabled

AdditionalContainerStorageEnabled.description: Whether the first data disk on the node has been configured, formatted, and mounted as the storage directory for container images and logs. Parameter values: false: not configured and formatted true: configured and formatted

AutoRenew.description: Whether the cloud server instance is automatically renewed upon expiration. Parameter values: true: auto renewal false: no auto renewal This parameter is returned only when InstanceChargeType=PrePaid.

AutoRenewPeriod.description: Automatic renewal duration for cloud server instance, in months. This parameter is returned only when AutoRenew=true.

DataVolumes.description: Data disk configuration for the node

DeploymentSetGroupNumber.description: Group number of the instance in the deployment set. 0 means not set

DeploymentSetId.description: Deployment set ID to be added to the instance

Hostname.description: Host name corresponding to the node

HpcClusterIds.description: High performance computing cluster ID. When the node pool is configured with high performance computing GPU node types, returns the high performance computing cluster ID

ImageId.description: Image ID used by the cloud server corresponding to the node

InitializeScript.description: Custom script executed after creating and initializing the node. Shell script in Base64 encoding

InstanceChargeType.description: Billing type for cloud server instance. Parameter value description: PostPaid: pay-as-you-go. PrePaid: subscription (annual/monthly).

InstanceTypeIds.description: List of cloud server instance type IDs corresponding to the node

InstancesDistribution.description: Configure the mixed strategy for spot and pay-as-you-go instances. This strategy takes effect when SpotStrategy is set to SpotAsPriceGo

NamePrefix.description: Node name prefix. An empty string or nil means the node name prefix policy is not enabled

Period.description: Duration for purchasing cloud server instance, in months. This parameter is returned only when InstanceChargeType=PrePaid

ProjectName.description: The project to which the ECS belongs. Each ECS can only belong to one project.

PublicAccessConfig.description: Configuration for automatic public network access for nodes

PublicAccessEnabled.description: Whether the node automatically enables public network access. Values: - false: disabled - true: enabled

SpotStrategy.description: Preemptive policy for pay-as-you-go billing. When InstanceChargeType=PostPaid: NoSpot: regular pay-as-you-go instance. SpotAsPriceGo: system auto-bidding, follows current market price.

SubnetIds.description: List of subnet IDs to which the node network belongs.

SystemVolume.description: System disk configuration for the node

Tags.description: Label information configured for the node pool

CreatingCount.description: Total number of nodes with Phase=Creating.

DeletingCount.description: Total number of nodes with Phase=Deleting.

FailedCount.description: Total number of nodes with Phase=Failed

RunningCount.description: Total number of nodes with Phase=Running

TotalCount.description: Total number of nodes in the node pool.

UpdatingCount.description: Total number of nodes with Phase=Updating

Bandwidth.description: Peak bandwidth for the public IP, unit: Mbps

BillingType.description: Billing type for public IP: 2: Pay-as-you-go by bandwidth cap. 3: Pay-as-you-go by actual traffic.

Isp.description: Public IP line type. Parameter description: BGP: BGP (multi-line)

SecurityGroupIds.description: List of security group IDs for the node network

SecurityStrategies.description: Node security policy. Parameter value description: Hids: host security hardening

SecurityStrategyEnabled.description: Whether security hardening is enabled for the node. Parameter value description: true: enabled. false: not enabled.

Conditions.description: Status conditions of the node pool in its current primary state, indicating the reason for entering this state

Phase.description: Status of the node pool. Parameter values: Creating, Running, Updating, Deleting, Failed, Scaling.

Name.description: Resource name. Values: cpu or memory.

Quantity.description: Resource quantity for the specified resource. - For cpu, example value: 200m - For memory, example value: 1G

Size.description: Cloud disk capacity, in GiB. Value description: default: 40 GiB. Ultra-fast SSD (ESSD_PL0, ESSD_FlexPL): 40–2048 GiB

Type.description: Cloud disk type: ESSD_PL0: (default) Ultra SSD with performance level PL0. ESSD_FlexPL: Ultra SSD with performance level PL1

Effect.description: Taint effect. Values: NoSchedule (default): do not schedule. NoExecute: evict pods that do not tolerate the taint. PreferNoSchedule: avoid scheduling if possible.

description: In addition to standard custom node pools, container service supports the default node pool (fixed name vke-default-nodepool) for managing existing cloud server (ECS) instances. The default node pool has the same security, advanced, and additional configuration capabilities as standard node pools, but does not support scaling or editing the number of nodes.

ClusterId.description: Cluster ID where the node pool is located

KubernetesConfig.description: Kubernetes-related configuration for the node pool

Name.description: Node pool name. Must be unique within the same cluster. Supports uppercase and lowercase English letters, Chinese characters, numbers, and hyphens (-). Length: 2–64 characters

NodeConfig.description: Cloud server (ECS) instance configuration in the node pool

NodeStatistics.description: Node statistics in the node pool.

UpdatedTime.description: Time when the node pool was updated
